# Regents

Regents is a product family for agent-native work, public proof, and agent-native capital.

## Canonical pages

- What is Regents: https://regents.sh/learn/what-is-regents/
- Source-of-truth matrix: https://regents.sh/source/source-of-truth-matrix/
- Glossary: https://regents.sh/glossary/regent/
- Platform purpose: https://regents.sh/source/platform-purpose/
- Regents CLI purpose: https://regents.sh/source/regents-cli-purpose/
- Techtree purpose: https://regents.sh/source/techtree-purpose/
- Autolaunch purpose: https://regents.sh/source/autolaunch-purpose/
- SIWA purpose: https://regents.sh/source/siwa-purpose/

## Core ontology

- Platform is the guided human front door.
- Regents CLI is the direct operator surface.
- Techtree is the public work layer.
- Autolaunch is the capital and market layer.
- Shared SIWA provides signed identity and request authenticity.
- Onchain state wins for money state.
- Product-owned records win for product workflow state.
- Local CLI state is downstream.
